overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending from a dark interior stairwell into a sunlit futuristic cityscape during golden hour. The player walks through an urban plaza with overhead monorail tracks, past pedestrians, and along elevated walkways with views of neon-lit skyscrapers and palm-lined streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial stairwell with metal security door

agents.ego_description: ascending a dimly lit concrete stairwell toward a bright exit at the top

entered.detail: large industrial metal door with warning stripes at the bottom of the stairwell
grey concrete stairs ascending steeply in the enclosed space
dark metal paneled walls with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark, enclosed industrial stairwell. The camera faces a large metal security door and begins ascending concrete stairs in low light conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor concrete stairwell ascending toward street level

events.description: emerging from darkness into intense golden hour sunlight at the stairwell exit
transitioning from indoor industrial space to outdoor urban environment

agents.ego_description: climbing outdoor concrete stairs with metal railings, facing directly into the bright sunset

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs in the opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: metal handrails lining both sides of the outdoor staircase
tall modern skyscrapers visible at the top of the stairs against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dark interior into a blindingly bright outdoor stairwell during golden hour. Metal railings line the concrete stairs as they ascend toward the city street above, passing a pedestrian descending in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with elevated monorail track

events.description: reaching the top of stairs and transitioning to level walking surface

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward the setting sun, passing under the monorail structure

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction toward the sunset-lit plaza

entered.detail: elevated concrete and metal monorail track running overhead with geometric support arches
massive modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline ahead
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sunset sky along the left side of the plaza
illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'EL GUAPO' on the right side

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a vast open plaza bathed in golden hour light, the camera walks toward the setting sun under an elevated monorail track. A massive glass skyscraper looms ahead while palm trees line the left side and digital billboards glow on the right.

events.description: approaching and crossing a street intersection with traffic lights and bollards

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: standing at the street corner near a traffic light waiting to cross
walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern street lamps with horizontal light fixtures lining the sidewalk
traffic signal showing red light at the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busier street environment with moderate pedestrian density. The camera crosses a street intersection marked with crosswalks and traffic lights, while the monorail track shifts to the left and the tall building now dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban plaza with abandoned structures

events.description: entering overgrown urban area with patches of grass and weeds replacing paved surfaces

agents.ego_description: walking through a neglected urban area with overgrown vegetation and abandoned concrete structures

notable_agents.action: walking ahead through the overgrown plaza toward the distant structures

entered.detail: patches of tall grass and weeds growing through cracked concrete
derelict low-rise buildings with weathered concrete facades
large ferris wheel visible on the horizon against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a more derelict urban area with overgrown grass and abandoned structures. The ground transitions from pavement to grassy patches as the camera moves toward a distant ferris wheel, with the monorail track now centered overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: ascending onto elevated walkway revealing dense futuristic cityscape with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated bridge with expansive views of neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the elevated walkway toward the dense city center

entered.detail: raised concrete pedestrian bridge with metal railings overlooking the city
large green neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on the side of a distant building
illuminated sign with 'LOS OSOS' text visible on building facade
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with neon lights and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an elevated walkway offering panoramic views of a dense futuristic cityscape. Neon signs including a prominent 'HOTEL' and 'LOS OSOS' illuminate the left side while the monorail track runs along the right, with the sun setting behind the towering skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a dim industrial interior into a sprawling, sun-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins in a dark, enclosed stairwell, climbing concrete steps toward a metal security door before emerging into the blinding golden hour light of an outdoor staircase. As the camera reaches the street level, the scene opens into a vast plaza where the view expands to include palm trees, glowing billboards, and a massive glass skyscraper under an elevated monorail track. The movement then carries through a busy intersection with crossing pedestrians before shifting into a more derelict urban zone characterized by overgrown grass and abandoned structures. Finally, the camera ascends onto an elevated walkway, revealing a panoramic cityscape of neon signs and towering skyscrapers silhouetted against the setting sun.
